---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, flag, output format, or integration
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is (e.g. "I need to stream results into an Arrow IPC stream for downstream in a Snakemake rule without writing TSV").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What the new flag / command / Python API should do.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other tools or work-arounds.

**Additional context**
Links to papers, existing RADSex issues, or your own analysis scripts.
